old_value: {"id":"fotos-15o","title":"Support multi-language OCR (fra/deu/spa tessdata download)","description":"The ai-processing spec requires OCR language support beyond English. After eng.traineddata is bundled (fotos-e47), add: a language selector in the AI settings panel (dropdown: English, French, German, Spanish); on-demand tessdata download from tessdata GitHub releases to app data directory; download progress indicator; language preference persisted to settings. The run_ocr() command must accept an optional lang parameter (default 'eng') and pass it to Tesseract initialization. Depends on fotos-e47 (tessdata bundling).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:28:41Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:28:41Z"}

{"id":"fotos-15o","title":"Support multi-language OCR (fra/deu/spa tessdata download)","description":"The ai-processing spec requires OCR language support beyond English. After eng.traineddata is bundled (fotos-e47), add: a language selector in the AI settings panel (dropdown: English, French, German, Spanish); on-demand tessdata download from tessdata GitHub releases to app data directory; download progress indicator; language preference persisted to settings. The run_ocr() command must accept an optional lang parameter (default 'eng') and pass it to Tesseract initialization. Depends on fotos-e47 (tessdata bundling).","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:28:41Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T17:57:15Z"}

{"id":"fotos-33s","title":"Implement trackpad pinch-to-zoom","description":"The canvas engine handles Ctrl+wheel for trackpad pinch but native pinch gesture events (GestureEvent on Safari, or ctrlKey+wheel on Chrome/WebView2) may not be fully handled on all platforms. Verify and implement: detect pinch via wheel event with ctrlKey=true and deltaMode=0 (pixel mode); compute zoom centered on pinch midpoint; prevent default to stop OS zoom. Test on Wayland with libinput trackpad. Should use the same cursor-centered zoom math as mouse wheel.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:01Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:01Z"}

{"id":"fotos-qa2","title":"Add smooth zoom animation with easing","description":"Zoom changes from mouse wheel or keyboard are instant. Add optional smooth animation: when zoom changes, use requestAnimationFrame to interpolate from current zoom to target zoom over ~150ms using ease-out curve. Must not break zoom-while-still-animating (new zoom target replaces old). Should be a setting (smooth zoom: on/off, default on). Only affects visual rendering, not stored zoom value.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:03Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:03Z"}

{"id":"fotos-lqk","title":"Show recent colors in color picker","description":"The color picker UI ticket covers the basic picker. This separate ticket tracks the recent colors feature specifically: persist last 8 used stroke colors and last 8 fill colors to settings (tauri-plugin-store); display them as clickable swatches in the color picker popup; update the recent list when a new color is applied to an annotation (not just selected in picker); deduplicate by hex value; evict oldest when list is full.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:06Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:06Z"}

{"id":"fotos-3vn","title":"Add ARIA accessibility labels to toolbar buttons","description":"Toolbar buttons use emoji/text labels but lack proper ARIA attributes for screen readers. Per the ui-shell spec, add: aria-label attributes to all icon-only buttons, aria-pressed for toggle-state tool buttons (to indicate active tool), role=toolbar on the toolbar element, aria-keyshortcuts attributes listing keyboard shortcuts, tooltips via title attribute as fallback. This is a pure HTML/CSS change with no JS required.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:26Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:26Z"}

{"id":"fotos-2x0","title":"Implement settings schema versioning and migration","description":"No schema versioning is in place for persisted settings. If setting keys or types change between app versions, stored data may be invalid. Need: a SETTINGS_VERSION constant, version field written to store on first save, migration functions that upgrade from version N to N+1 (run at app startup if stored version \u003c current), defaults applied for any missing keys. Start at version 1 with the current schema.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:03Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:03Z"}

{"id":"fotos-dxj","title":"Complete Save As dialog integration with native file picker","description":"Complete the Save As dialog end-to-end flow. (1) Implement export-dialog.js which is currently a stub — it should open the native Tauri file picker (tauri-plugin-dialog save dialog) with PNG/JPEG/WebP format filters and a default filename of fotos-YYYY-MM-DD-HHmmss.{ext}. (2) Wire the Save button click and Ctrl+S keyboard shortcut to trigger this dialog. (3) Infer format from chosen file extension and pass to invoke('save_image'). (4) Show success toast on completion, descriptive error toast on failure. (5) Handle dialog cancel gracefully (no-op). Verify that the path traversal protection in save_image() still works with paths from the dialog.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:38Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:29:31Z"}

{"id":"fotos-1gh","title":"Implement multi-select (Ctrl+click, Shift+click, Select All)","description":"Per selection-history spec, the selection tool should support: Ctrl+click to toggle individual annotations in/out of selection, Shift+click to extend selection, Ctrl+A to select all annotations, drag-select rectangle to select annotations within area. Multi-selection should show a combined bounding box. Operations (delete, move) should apply to all selected annotations as a group via a single undoable command.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:07Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:07Z"}

{"id":"fotos-zlh","title":"Implement annotation lock enforcement","description":"The locked boolean field exists on Annotation but nothing prevents locked annotations from being moved, resized, or deleted. Per the annotation-tools spec, locked annotations must: be unselectable by click/drag, be excluded from Select All, show a lock indicator instead of resize handles when hovered, be skipped by Delete key. Add a lock/unlock action in the context menu and possibly a toolbar button when annotation is selected. History should record lock/unlock as undoable commands.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:12Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:12Z"}

{"id":"fotos-8vg","title":"Complete stroke-width size picker UI","description":"Implement the stroke-width picker popover and font-size picker for the annotation toolbar. The #size-picker element exists but size-picker.js is a stub. For stroke width: popover with a range slider (1-20px), 5 preset buttons (1/2/4/8/16px), visual line sample showing current width; updates StateStore strokeWidth. For font size: separate slider or preset buttons for text annotation font size (8/12/16/24/36/48px); updates StateStore fontSize (new key). Both values must be applied to annotation previews immediately and persisted to settings as defaults.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:22:57Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:29:25Z"}

{"id":"fotos-hw4","title":"Implement toast and error notification system","description":"The status bar #status-message is used for transient messages but it is small and easy to miss. Per the ui-shell spec, a #toast-container element should show non-blocking toast notifications for: successful saves (green), errors (red), clipboard copy confirmation, AI analysis completion. Toasts should auto-dismiss after 4 seconds with a fade-out animation, support manual dismiss, and stack vertically. This is a frontend-only change (HTML + CSS + JS showToast() helper).","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:32Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:32Z"}

{"id":"fotos-3aq","title":"Implement theme system (CSS custom properties, light/dark/system)","description":"The UI uses hardcoded colors rather than CSS custom properties. Per the ui-shell spec, need: define all colors as CSS custom properties in :root (e.g. --bg-primary, --text-primary, --border-color, --accent); light and dark theme overrides via [data-theme=light]/[data-theme=dark] selectors; system theme detection via prefers-color-scheme media query; manual override stored in settings. Theme switch must rerender all canvas placeholder text using the new --text-secondary value.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:21Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:21Z"}

{"id":"fotos-dbf","title":"Implement z-order operations (Bring to Front, Send to Back, etc.)","description":"Annotations are rendered in array order but there is no UI to reorder them. Per the annotation-tools spec, need: Bring to Front, Send to Back, Bring Forward, Send Backward operations accessible via right-click context menu when an annotation is selected. Each operation reorders the annotations array and is recorded as an undoable command. Frontend renders annotation layers in array order (index 0 = bottom).","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:16Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:16Z"}

{"id":"fotos-1gh","title":"Implement multi-select (Ctrl+click, Shift+click, Select All)","description":"Per selection-history spec, the selection tool should support: Ctrl+click to toggle individual annotations in/out of selection, Shift+click to extend selection, Ctrl+A to select all annotations, drag-select rectangle to select annotations within area. Multi-selection should show a combined bounding box. Operations (delete, move) should apply to all selected annotations as a group via a single undoable command.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-02-23T23:23:07Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T19:45:49Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Window position and size are not saved between sessions. NOTE: The ui-shell spec only requires opening at 1200x800 with 800x600 min — it does not require state persistence. This is a UX enhancement beyond spec. If pursued: use tauri-plugin-window-state or persist via the settings store. Moving to P4 (backlog).","priority":4}
old_value: {"id":"fotos-gms","title":"Window state persistence: save/restore position and size","description":"The window position and size are not saved between sessions. The spec implies the app should remember window state. Use tauri-plugin-window-state or persist window dimensions/position via the settings store and restore on startup.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-05T22:29:44Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-05T22:29:44Z"}

new_value: {"description":"The IPC server dispatch() in src-tauri/src/ipc/server.rs only handles 'get_settings'. All other commands the MCP server forwards via call_via_bridge — take_screenshot, ocr_screenshot, annotate_screenshot, auto_redact_pii, analyze_screenshot, list_screenshots — return 'unknown command'. The MCP tools all silently fail when the app is running. Need to wire up all 6 command handlers in the dispatch() match arm, calling the appropriate Tauri command functions and returning serialized results over the IPC socket.","title":"MCP IPC bridge: implement full command dispatch in Tauri server"}

Update to v0.3.0 with today's date (2026-03-06) and accurate release notes covering: IPC bridge, all 6 MCP tools, LLM vision (Claude/OpenAI/Gemini), window position persistence, export dialog, and complete annotation tool set.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-06T16:54:58Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-06T16:54:58Z"}

new_value: {"description":"In the keychain Tauri commands (get_api_key, set_api_key, delete_api_key), accept 'endpoint:{id}' as a valid provider key. The current credentials.rs wraps every provider as '{provider}-api-key', so passing 'endpoint-{id}' will store under account 'endpoint-{id}-api-key' in service 'fotos' — consistent with how 'anthropic' stores as 'anthropic-api-key'. The Tauri command layer must translate the colon-form 'endpoint:{id}' (used in dispatch) to the hyphen-form 'endpoint-{id}' before calling credentials functions (colons are unsafe in some keychain backends)."}
old_value: {"id":"fotos-bla","title":"Update keychain commands to accept endpoint:{id} provider keys","description":"In the keychain Tauri commands (get_api_key, set_api_key, delete_api_key), accept 'endpoint:{id}' as a valid provider key. Store/retrieve the key in OS keychain service 'fotos' with account name 'endpoint-{id}' (hyphen-separated, since colons are unsafe in some keychain backends).","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:47Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:47Z"}

All OpenAI-compatible providers are now handled by the generic openai_compat adapter."}

This is the core data model change that supports user-defined endpoint lists.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:41Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:41Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Add a migration function in settings that upgrades schema v1 to v2: (1) read old openaiModel → create endpoint entry named 'OpenAI' with base_url 'https://api.openai.com/v1'; (2) read ollamaUrl+ollamaModel → create endpoint 'Ollama (local)' (edge case: strip trailing /v1 from ollamaUrl before storing, so /v1 is not doubled); (3) update defaultLlmProvider from 'openai'/'ollama' to the new 'endpoint:{id}' format, 'claude'/'gemini' unchanged; (4) migrate the OpenAI keychain entry: read the key stored under 'openai-api-key', write it to 'endpoint-{openai-entry-id}-api-key', then delete 'openai-api-key'. If the keychain migration (step 4) fails, log the error and continue — the schema is still bumped to v2 and the user can re-enter the key in Settings."}
old_value: {"id":"fotos-b8h","title":"Add schema migration v1→v2 for settings","description":"Add a migration function in settings that upgrades schema v1 to v2: convert openaiModel field to an endpoint entry named 'OpenAI' with base_url 'https://api.openai.com/v1'; convert ollamaUrl+ollamaModel to endpoint 'Ollama (local)'; update defaultLlmProvider string from 'openai'/'ollama' to the new 'endpoint:{id}' format. Edge case: if existing ollamaUrl already ends with /v1, do not append another /v1.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:51Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:51Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Write the JS that manages endpoint rows in settings.js: (1) a createEndpointRow(endpoint) function that clones the \u003ctemplate id='endpoint-row-tpl'\u003e from fotos-a6r, fills in the endpoint id/name/base_url/model, and wires up 'Set Key' (calls setApiKey with 'endpoint:{id}') and 'Delete Key' (calls deleteApiKey with 'endpoint:{id}') button events; (2) a removeEndpointRow(id) helper for the delete button; (3) an addEndpointRow() handler for the 'Add endpoint' button that generates a new UUID-derived id and appends a blank row. The HTML template element itself is fotos-a6r."}
old_value: {"id":"fotos-d62","title":"Add endpoint row template with Set Key / Delete Key actions","description":"Create the endpoint row template (JS or HTML): fields for name, base URL, and model; 'Set Key' and 'Delete Key' action buttons wired to setApiKey/deleteApiKey Tauri commands with the 'endpoint:{id}' provider string. Each row holds its id in a data attribute.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-07T02:40:04Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-07T02:40:04Z"}

new_value: {"description":"Document in MCP server docs (src-mcp/ or a BREAKING_CHANGES.md) that the analyze_llm provider strings 'openai' and 'ollama' are removed after this change. The new form is 'endpoint:{id}' where {id} is the 8-character UUID fragment assigned when the endpoint was created in Settings (e.g. 'endpoint:a3f21c9b'). Because IDs are user-generated at runtime, MCP callers cannot hardcode a specific string — they must read the endpoint list from settings to discover valid provider strings. This is a breaking change for any external caller passing 'openai' or 'ollama' as the provider."}
old_value: {"id":"fotos-fmp","title":"Document breaking change for MCP callers: openai/ollama provider strings replaced","description":"Note in MCP server docs (or a BREAKING_CHANGES file) that the analyze_llm provider strings 'openai' and 'ollama' are replaced by 'endpoint:{openai-entry-id}' and 'endpoint:{ollama-local-id}' after this change. MCP callers must update their provider strings. This is a breaking change for external callers.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-07T02:40:19Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-07T02:40:19Z"}

new_value: {"description":"In src-ui/js/ui/settings.js, update the DEFAULTS.ai object: remove ollamaUrl, ollamaModel, and openaiModel fields; add an endpoints array with two default entries — { id: 'openai', name: 'OpenAI', base_url: 'https://api.openai.com/v1', model: 'gpt-4o' } and { id: 'ollama-local', name: 'Ollama (local)', base_url: 'http://localhost:11434', model: 'llava:7b' } (no trailing /v1 on Ollama — base_url is the server root, not the API prefix). Keep claudeModel, geminiModel, ocrLanguage, and defaultLlmProvider fields unchanged."}
old_value: {"id":"fotos-xhb","title":"Update DEFAULTS.ai in settings.js for endpoint list","description":"In src-ui/js/ui/settings.js, update the DEFAULTS.ai object: replace fixed openai/ollama fields with two default endpoint entries (OpenAI at https://api.openai.com/v1 with gpt-4o, and Ollama local at http://localhost:11434/v1 with llava:7b). Set defaultLlmProvider to 'claude' as the default. This keeps the frontend in sync with backend defaults.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"charly.vibes@proton.me","created_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:57Z","created_by":"charly vibes","updated_at":"2026-03-07T02:39:57Z"}
